query:
DELETE rc1 FROM roster_cache rc1
INNER JOIN roster_cache rc2
WHERE rc1.id < rc2.id
  AND rc1.parish = rc2.parish
  AND rc1.inmateName = rc2.inmateName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3jG43XgGpQVQTdi.root --database PmzqLjMVUdTNsxn8Y5dW8X --execute DELETE rc1 FROM roster_cache rc1
INNER JOIN roster_cache rc2
WHERE rc1.id < rc2.id
  AND rc1.parish = rc2.parish
  AND rc1.inmateName = rc2.inmateName;
